CustomField.inlineHelpText: Whether the Value Chain can be shared, who decides the market retail price and wholesale price (10 Points) (Control of terminal price)
CustomField.label: Willingness to cooperate with Hisense A

value.label: Share, Termial price determined by Hisense
Share, Termial price determined by Hisense and customer
Share, Termial price determined by customer accordance with Hisense policy
No share,The retail price and wholesales price should be determined by themselves
